decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-25. The slugify helper and its acceptance criteria are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.
acceptance_criteria: The returned slug is entirely lowercase.
Every run of one or more non-alphanumeric characters (spaces, punctuation, symbols, non-ASCII) is replaced by a single hyphen.
There are no leading or trailing hyphens.
There are never two or more consecutive hyphens.
Input that contains no alphanumeric characters returns an empty string.
